name: Performance Engineering :: Jane Street
snippet:
Jane Street is a quantitative trading firm and liquidity provider. NTT algorithms on FPGAs with Hardcaml Accelerating machine learning
Jane Street is a quantitative trading firm and liquidity provider with a unique focus on technology and collaborative problem solving.

name: Building FPGA-based Machine Learning Accelerators in Python
snippet: In this talk, we will demo a simple machine learning accelerator deployed on a commodity FPGA and developed using a Python-based toolchain.
